creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
ok,  racket-minimal randomly fails and it seems I merged base r273250 to this 10.1 jail which causes the node010 failure

Are you interested in results on 9.3 with the first version of the ports patch or should I relaunch it with the new version?

It's currently ongoing at  http://package22.nyi.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=93amd64-default-misc&build=2015-04-02_23h58m27s
